"cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:A/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:H/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:N/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-319", "name": "Cleartext Transmission of Sensitive Information"}], "description": "## Summary

Before OpenClaw 2026.4.2, Android accepted non-loopback cleartext `ws://` gateway endpoints and would send stored gateway credentials over that connection. Discovery beacons or setup codes could therefore steer the client onto a cleartext remote endpoint.

## Impact

A user who followed a forged discovery result or scanned a crafted setup code could disclose stored gateway credentials to an attacker-controlled endpoint in plaintext. This was a transport-security bug in the Android gateway client.

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Affected versions: `<= 2026.4.1`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.4.2`
- Latest published npm version: `2026.4.1`

## Fix Commit(s)

- `a941a4fef9bc43b2973c92d0dcff5b8a426210c5` — require TLS for remote Android gateway endpoints

## Release Process Note

The fix is present on `main` and is staged for OpenClaw `2026.4.2`. Publish this advisory after the `2026.4.2` npm release is live.

Thanks @zsxsoft for reporting.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00118, "percentile": 0.01977}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-83f3-hh45-vfw9", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-07T18:16:06Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-83f3-hh45-vfw9", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-83f3-hh45-vfw9"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-40045"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-21T00:16:29Z", "published_at": "2026-04-07T18:16:06Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-83f3-hh45-vfw9", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/a941a4fef9bc43b2973c92d0dcff5b8a426210c5", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40045", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-cleartext-credential-transmission-via-unencrypted-websocket-gateway-endpoints", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-83f3-hh45-vfw9"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-83f3-hh45-vfw9", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Android accepted cleartext remote gateway endpoints and sent stored credentials over ws://", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-24T21:04:43Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-83f3-hh45-vfw9", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.4.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw: Android accepted cleartext remote gateway endpoints and sent stored credentials over ws://
